home.hero.title: I build businesses and software where technology, data and finance meet.
home.hero.subtitle: Founder, operator and builder with a background in quantitative modeling, financial markets and legal technology.

home.background.title: A trajectory built across three fronts
home.background.subtitle: From technical training and applied research, through quantitative finance, to building businesses grounded in technology and data.
home.background.entrepreneur.title: Entrepreneurship
home.background.entrepreneur.description: Today I work on building Artemis, combining software, data, operations and business structuring to transform legal claims into liquidity. My work sits at the intersection of product, execution, systems architecture and model development applied to real problems in the legal market.
home.background.quant.title: Quant & Financial Markets
home.background.quant.description: Work in quantitative finance focused on asset modeling, market simulation, systematic strategies and data infrastructure for analysis. This phase consolidated a way of thinking driven by hypothesis, measurement, risk and evidence-based decision-making.
home.background.education.title: Education
home.background.education.description: Education in Mechanical Engineering at Insper with a focus on computational simulation, data science and machine learning. Later, a specialization in data science at ICMC/USP built a strong foundation in modeling, quantitative research and analytical systems. Today, that technical background is complemented by executive education in business management at FGV.
